task_completion.description: Navigate to the stock inventory creation page in Ekylibre
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Ekylibre application open in a web browser, specifically on a page for managing or creating a new stock inventory.
A text field for the inventory name contains the exact text 'Year-End Stock Count Jan 2024'.
A date field for the inventory contains '2024-01-15' (or an equivalent localized format like Jan 15, 2024).

task_completion.description: Include at least two product items in the inventory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The inventory form or table shows at least two distinct rows or entries for different product items being counted.

task_completion.description: Enter positive counted quantities for the products
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quantity input fields corresponding to the added product items contain numbers greater than 0.

task_completion.description: Save or create the inventory record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Inventory created') is shown, or the saved inventory record is visible in a list or detail view.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web GUI to create the inventory
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre web interface is visible in a browser window. No terminal, API script, or command prompt is used to create the record.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with actual form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are typed into standard web form fields within the Ekylibre application, not a text editor or a mock page.
Browser developer tools are not open, and the page layout looks like a standard Ekylibre interface without artificially manipulated text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The inventory record must be named exactly 'Year-End Stock Count Jan 2024'. The date must be '2024-01-15' (or equivalent format). The inventory must contain at least 2 product items, each with a positive counted quantity.
